name: aurora-ai-audio-player
title: Aurora AI Audio Player
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native audio player parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/audio-player.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`.
